description: Galvantula beats all the losses that Bellibolt has (Toxtricity, Graveler, Emolga) while Bellibolt's bulk and Sucker Punch coverage handle the threats that trouble Galvantula. Creator explicitly identifies this as a core that 'should right now run through this' meta.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: Best ELECTRIC CUP TEAMS AND POKEMON | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Minun banks Grass Knot energy while Galvantula pressures shields with Energy Ball, enabling combo plays where Galvantula forces the shield and Minun snipes with the banked Grass Knot. Their combined Grass coverage handles Lanturn, the meta's top threat.

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: Minun is your WORST NIGHTMARE in the Electric Cup! | Pokémon GO Battle League
